caption: A man wearing a red polo shirt and a lanyard around his neck stands against a brick wall, addressing a small group of people whose heads are visible in the foreground. He holds a white pamphlet or document featuring colorful images. As he speaks, he gestures with his right hand and looks toward the individuals in front of him. The people listening are seen from behind, showing their dark hair and light-colored clothing. The scene remains consistent in its indoor setting with a rustic brick background. Between the frames, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and his hand moves to emphasize his points while he continues to hold the printed material. No specific text on the lanyard or pamphlet is legible.
